themes.reasoning_notes: ETB makes multiple 1/1 flying Harpy tokens based on devotion to black; the card's main deckbuilding pull is token generation.
Upkeep sacrifice clause wants expendable creatures, and the ETB tokens help feed that cost in sacrifice shells.
ETB token count scales directly with devotion to black, making it a clear devotion payoff rather than generic token support.
Creates multiple 1/1 flying Harpies on entry, so it meaningfully supports token plans, but only as a secondary theme here.
Its upkeep sacrifice clause and self-made expendable tokens naturally fit sacrifice shells as fodder support.
